meta.title: Lumio — Wedding invitations that feel like you
meta.description: Make a warm invitation page in minutes. Share with guests via a single link.

signIn.title: Sign in to Lumio
signIn.subtitle: Pick up where you left off with your invitation.

signUp.title: Create a Lumio account
signUp.subtitle: Save your invitation and come back any time.

errors.emailTaken: That email is already registered. Try signing in instead.
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Email isn't confirmed yet. Check your inbox for the confirmation link, or ask the admin to disable email confirmation.
errors.rateLimit: Supabase hit its free-tier email rate limit (too many signups in a short window). Wait a few minutes, or ask the admin to disable email confirmation in the dashboard.
errors.weakPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.signupDisabled: Signups are temporarily disabled by the admin.
errors.signInFail: Couldn't sign in. Check your email and password.
errors.signUpFail: Couldn't sign up. Please try again in a moment.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

toast.signOutFail: Couldn't sign you out. Try again.
toast.uploadFail: Photo upload failed. Please try again.

home.headline: Invitations that feel like you.
home.lede: Pick a template, fill in your story, share with guests via one link.

templates.heading: Pick the one that feels most like you.
templates.lede: Every template is built for one thing: making your story easy to read for the people who matter most.
templates.empty: Templates are on the way. Start now — we'll match you when you're ready.

howItWorks.heading: Three steps. No more.
howItWorks.step1Body: Choose a template that matches your style.
howItWorks.step2Body: Tell your story — names, date, place, and a few small details.
howItWorks.step3Body: Get one link. Send it to guests on WhatsApp or anywhere.

testimonials.heading: Stories from those who went first.
testimonials.empty: The first story will come from you. After your day, share it and be the first here.

cta.heading: Ready to begin?
cta.body: Your invitation page is waiting. No credit card needed.

items.a: Lumio is a tool to make a wedding invitation page that anyone can open via a single link, on any device.
Free for now. Premium templates and features are coming soon.

items.q: Do my guests need an account?
items.a: No. Guests just open the link — no login, no app to download.

items.q: Can I edit the design after sharing the link?
items.a: Yes, any time. Updates show on the same link — no need to resend.
Your invitation data is stored on encrypted infrastructure. We never share it with third parties.

design.heading: Pick a template, begin your story.
design.lede: Six templates, each with its own character. Click one to start — you can switch any time.

editor.sectionTip: This section is auto-saved in your browser.
editor.sectionDisabledMessage: This section is disabled. Turn it on to add content.
editor.allDisabledHint: All sections are off. Enable at least one in the editor.
editor.defaultFromWeddingDate: Auto-filled from your wedding date — overwrite to change.
editor.savedBody: The link below is ready to share. Guests can open it in any browser.
editor.uploadTooBig: Each photo must be 8 MB or less.

dashboard.heading: My creations
dashboard.lede: Everything you've made, in one place.
dashboard.emptyBody: Your first page is waiting. Pick a template, tell your story, and share with guests via one link.

meta.title: Bloom — a small thing for someone
meta.description: A digital bouquet that blooms from a link. Each flower carries one message, one feeling.

home.headline: A small thing, for someone.
home.lede: A digital bouquet that blooms from a link. Pick the flowers, write the messages, send it to someone you love.

flowers.heading: Each flower means something.
flowers.lede: Pick the flowers, then write a small message for each one.
flowers.hint: Tap a flower to see what it means

howItWorks.heading: Three steps. No more.
howItWorks.step1Body: Three to eight flowers. Each one carries a meaning.
howItWorks.step2Body: One short sentence for each flower, and one note for whoever opens it.
howItWorks.step3Body: Share one link. The flowers bloom when opened.

bloom.tapToBloom: Tap to make the flowers bloom

meta.title: Something for you — Kaado
meta.description: A small digital gift, sent through a single link.

index.heading: Small gifts that travel far.
index.lede: For the two of you split across cities or time zones. Pick a template, fill in your story, send one link — the whole gift lives inside the link itself.

editor.linkHint: No account needed. The whole gift is packed into the link — copy it and send it over WhatsApp.
editor.missingRequired: Fill the fields marked * to create the link.
editor.copyImageFail: Couldn't copy the image. Save it instead.
editor.qrTooLong: The gift is too long for a QR code. Shorten the letter, or share the link directly.

player.replyCta: Reply with a small gift of your own
player.envelopeHintAjar: Tap again to take the letter
